title: Analyzing Financial Reports
scenario: A financial analyst needs to analyze quarterly financial reports for a company. The report includes a detailed breakdown of income, expenses, assets, and liabilities. The analyst wants to generate a summary of the report that highlights key financial metrics.
constraints: Must include specific financial metrics such as net income, gross margin, and return on equity

evaluationCriteria.description: The summary adheres to the word limit and includes the required financial metrics.
The tone of the summary is professional and objective.
The financial metrics are accurate and correctly interpreted.
